working_on: Phase 5 production audit master-plan session per S-0081 gate's PROCEED recommendation. Authors engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (gate report defining SEP-anchored prompt template, evidence file schema, Tier 1/2/3 triage, 4 pre-listed audit-system-input proposals, structural-reopen pre-flag for cross_domain_dependency / historical_influence) + replaces engine/session/auto_target.json with T-PHASE-5-AUDIT (12 tasks, max_sessions 14, depends_on graph, per-task scope_lock).
outcome_summary: Phase 5 production audit master-plan session per S-0081 gate's PROCEED recommendation. Two artifacts authored: (1) engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md — master-plan gate report with fixed SEP-anchored prompt template (per-edge + per-node), fixed evidence file schema, sample-size policy (35% per-subdomain per S-0081 expansion rule), three diagnostic syllabus targets (Gettier / modal_realism / social_contract_theory substituting for absent free_speech), Tier 1/2/3 triage, 4 pre-listed audit-system-input proposals, structural-reopen pre-flag for historical_influence activation; (2) engine/session/auto_target.json — replaced T-PHASE-5 (closed) with T-PHASE-5-AUDIT (12 tasks, max_sessions 14, depends_on AUDIT-CB-first → 10 parallel subdomain → AUDIT-HT-last; per-task scope_lock; criteria are file_exists + validate_passes). check_target.py parses cleanly. STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG.md updated. MemPalace: 3 new calls (search + diary_read + diary_write) — note: current_mempalace.jsonl accumulates across sessions (apparent tech-debt; file shows 7 cumulative calls including S-0081's 4). Considered new engine ADR formalizing post-phase production-audit pattern: deferred to closeout per T3-F. Considered closeout work (final reports, Issue filing, ADR memos): correctly scoped out of master plan — closeout is interactive after 12 routine evidence sessions complete. Validator: 31 checks, 0 hard-fails, 382 soft-warns (16 issue_collision annotated, 366 missing_rigor_score annotated, 0 mempalace_*_skipped).
declared_scope: Author the audit master-plan deliverables: (1) engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md — gate report containing methodology (SEP-anchored prompt template + evidence file schema), Tier 1/2/3 triage, sample sizes (35% per-subdomain density per the gate's expansion rule), the 4 pre-listed audit-system-input soft-warn proposals, and the structural-reopen pre-flag for cross_domain_dependency / historical_influence predicate activation; (2) engine/session/auto_target.json — replace with T-PHASE-5-AUDIT routine target, 12 tasks (AUDIT-CB cross-bridge census + 10 per-subdomain + AUDIT-HT hubs/traces), max_sessions 14, depends_on graph honoring AUDIT-CB-runs-first → 10 parallel subdomain → AUDIT-HT-after-all; (3) STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG.md updates; (4) MemPalace diary entry. NON-GOALS: producing candidate findings (that's evidence sessions' scope); the closeout reports (production-audit + audit-system-input — those land at audit closeout); rigor calibration; graph migration changes; OQ-DEC1 settlement; Phase 6 master plan. Considered new engine ADR for the post-phase production-audit pattern: defer until audit closeout (one cross-cutting mechanism is now under exercise; ADR-warranting structure may not crystallize until findings are in hand).

scope_delivery.explanation: Master-plan gate report authored with fixed SEP-anchored prompt template + evidence file schema + sample-size policy (35%) + 3 diagnostic targets + Tier 1/2/3 triage + 4 pre-listed audit-system-input proposals + structural-reopen pre-flag. auto_target.json replaced with T-PHASE-5-AUDIT (12 tasks, max_sessions 14). check_target.py parses cleanly. STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG.md updated. Closeout deliverables (final reports, Issues, ADR memos, README restructure) correctly scoped OUT of this session per T1-F discipline.
